message:
fix: pod_issues card guideline compliance (isRefreshing wiring) (#3172)

Add missing isRefreshing to useCardLoadingState call so CardWrapper
gets accurate refresh state from the cache hook instead of falling
back to the isLoading && hasData heuristic.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
